changeSet.author: openelis-pharma

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'pharmaceutical test section' AND english = 'Pharmaceutical'

changeSet.comment: Create localization entry for Pharmaceutical test section

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Pharmaceutical'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'pharmaceutical test section' AND english = 'Pharmaceutical' LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Excipients' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'excipients'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Excipients' AND description = 'sampleType name')

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Bulk powders' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'bulk powders'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Bulk powders' AND description = 'sampleType name')

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Intermediates' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'intermediates'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Intermediates' AND description = 'sampleType name')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'placebos'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Placebos' AND description = 'sampleType name')

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Reference standards' AND description = 'sampleType name')

column.name: name_localization_id

column.name: name_localization_id

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Plant leaf' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'plant leaf'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Plant leaf' AND description = 'sampleType name')

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Plant stem' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'plant stem'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Plant stem' AND description = 'sampleType name')

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Plant flower' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'plant flower'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Plant flower' AND description = 'sampleType name')

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'blood'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Blood' AND description = 'sampleType name' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'plasma'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Plasma' AND description = 'sampleType name' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'urine'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Urine' AND description = 'sampleType name' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'saliva'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Saliva' AND description = 'sampleType name' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'cerebrospinal fluid'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Cerebrospinal fluid' AND description = 'sampleType name' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'purified water'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'equipment swabs'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'environmental swabs'

column.name: name_localization_id

changeSet.author: openelis-pharma

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Pharmaceutical'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_departments nd JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON nd.notebook_id = n.id JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON nd.test_section_id = ts.id WHERE n.title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND ts.name = 'Pharmaceutical'

changeSet.comment: Link Pharmaceuticals Laboratory notebook template to Pharmaceutical department
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT n.id, ts.id FROM clinlims.notebook n, clinlims.test_section ts WHERE n.title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND ts.name = 'Pharmaceutical';

changeSet.author: openelis-pharma
changeSet.comment: Ensure Pharmaceuticals Laboratory notebook has all active organizations assigned.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_organizations (notebook_id, organization_id) SELECT n.id, o.id FROM clinlims.notebook n CROSS JOIN clinlims.organization o WHERE n.title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND o.is_active = 'Y' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_organizations no WHERE no.notebook_id = n.id AND no.organization_id = o.id );
